title: verbascum styriacum
intro: Verbascum styriacum, also known as Styrian mullein, is a biennial plant in the figwort family, native to Central and Eastern Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as respiratory issues, skin irritations, and wounds. The health benefits of Verbascum styriacum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Verbascum styriacum, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
